title: Anotis teysmanniana

The classification of Anotis teysmanniana places it within the kingdom Animalia and the phylum Arthropoda. It belongs to the class Insecta and the order Coleoptera. Further classification includes the suborder Polyphaga and the family Cetoniidae.

intro: Anotis teysmanniana, also known as Anotis teysmanniana, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, contributing to its potential in treating various health issues such as wounds, infections, and oxidative stress.
